---
name: Implementation Intake
about: Create a scoped implementation issue with clear context, expected behavior, and triage label
labels: needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the problem or feature in 1-3 short sentences.

## Context

Which domain/context does this belong to?

- [ ] Native C ABI (`src/native/CONTEXT.md`)
- [ ] Native engine runtime (`src/native/engine/CONTEXT.md`)
- [ ] API service (`src/typescript/api/CONTEXT.md`)
- [ ] Client applications (`src/typescript/react/CONTEXT.md`)
- [ ] Shared contracts/libraries (`src/typescript/shared/CONTEXT.md`)

## Expected behavior

What should happen when this is done?

## Actual behavior (if bug)

What happens today?

## Reproduction steps (if bug)

1. 
2. 
3. 

## Scope boundaries

What is explicitly in scope and out of scope?

## Validation

How will we know this is complete?

- [ ] API smoke still passes
- [ ] UI smoke still passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests where relevant
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior changed

## Triage

Apply one label at intake:

- needs-triage
- needs-info
- ready-for-agent
- ready-for-human
- wontfix
